title: Cheese Grater with Container for Kitchen | Stainless Steel Grater Handheld with Handle | 480ml Cheese Grater Box | Non-Slip Base Kitchenware, 21.5cm
features: ★ 2 in 1 Cheese Grater: Our cheese grater comes with two stainless-steel grate covers offering both medium/coarse and fine grating options. Our grater is also food safe.
★ Quality Kitchenware: Cheese grater is made of stainless-steel material, it does not rust, not fade, and is reusable. Storage container is made of PP will not be easy to rupture or warp.

★ Free Container: 480ml measuring storage container with non-slip base to hold your food for mess-free grating – grate directly into the container. The container also has a measuring line for easy and accurate measurements of ingredients which also helps keep your kitchen clean while cooking.
★ Multi-Functional Grater: Not just for cheese! This versatile food grater for the kitchen is great for many fruits and vegetables like garlic, carrot, cucumber, courgette and more.
★ Easy to Use: Easy clean and dishwasher safe, you can throw our cheese grater into the dishwasher for quick cleaning. The grater is pretty easy to clean although the surface looks irregular.
